title: felicia angustifolia
intro: Felicia angustifolia, also known as blue felicia, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Felicia angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Felicia angustifolia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is often used to treat various ailments.
